title: ECOSSDB Gene-to-ES Mapping Row
description: Schema for a single row in the es_gene_mapping.tsv file. Each row maps one gene identifier to one ecosystem service category.

es_code.description: CICES ecosystem service code (e.g. '2.3.5.1'). Must exist in the ontology file (db/ontology/cices_v5.2.tsv).

es_name.description: Human-readable ES name matching the ontology entry.

confidence.description: Confidence score. 0.90+ = direct evidence, 0.75-0.89 = strong inference, 0.50-0.74 = pathway-level, 0.25-0.49 = indirect, <0.25 = speculative.

evidence_source.description: Source of the mapping evidence. Use structured references: 'kegg_decoder', 'foam', 'literature:PMID:12345678', 'literature:DOI:10.1234/...', 'agent:<agent_id>'.

functional_role.description: The gene's functional role relative to the ecosystem service. producer: directly provides the ES. consumer: uses/depletes the ES. transformer: converts substrates in a way that contributes to the ES. inhibitor: actively works against the ES.

notes.description: Free-text notes, reasoning chain, or additional context.

examples.es_name: Controlling the chemical quality of freshwater

examples.notes: mcrA methyl-CoM reductase; produces CH4 greenhouse gas
